steps.title: Find the mass of one object
steps.content: If $r$ objects together have total mass $t$ kg, then each object has mass $\frac{t}{r}$ kg.

steps.title: Scale to 146r objects
steps.content:
The mass of $146r$ objects is:
$$146r \times \frac{t}{r} = 146t \text{ kg}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
